mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.draft_id AS "draftId", a.version_id AS "versionId", a.gen_table_id AS "genTableId", a.form_name AS "formName", a.apply_type AS "applyType", a.apply_result AS "applyResult", a.message AS "message", a.before_checksum AS "beforeChecksum", a.after_checksum AS "afterChecksum", a.detail_json AS "detailJson"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_apply_log a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_apply_log a WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} ORDER BY a.create_date DESC

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_apply_log a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.draft_id = #{draftId} ORDER BY a.create_date DESC

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_apply_log a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.gen_table_id = #{genTableId} ORDER BY a.create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_form_design_apply_log( id, create_by, create_date, del_flag, draft_id, version_id, gen_table_id, form_name, apply_type, apply_result, message, before_checksum, after_checksum, detail_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{delFlag}, #{draftId}, #{versionId}, #{genTableId}, #{formName}, #{applyType}, #{applyResult}, #{message}, #{beforeChecksum}, #{afterChecksum}, #{detailJson} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_form_design_apply_log SET draft_id = #{draftId}, version_id = #{versionId}, gen_table_id = #{genTableId}, form_name = #{formName}, apply_type = #{applyType}, apply_result = #{applyResult}, message = #{message}, before_checksum = #{beforeChecksum}, after_checksum = #{afterChecksum}, detail_json = #{detailJson} WHERE id = #{id}
